heading: Transforming Charitable Giving in Qatar
description: A comprehensive digital platform integrating with Sandi to bring transparency, efficiency, and trust to charitable donations across Qatar.
sectionDescription: Advanced capabilities designed for all stakeholders in the charitable ecosystem

features.title: Real-time Tracking
features.description: Follow your donation from start to finish with complete transparency.

features.title: Sandi Integration
features.description: Seamless coordination with Qatar's national assistance platform to prevent duplication.

features.title: Blockchain Security
features.description: Tamper-proof records of all transactions ensuring complete transparency.

features.title: Multi-platform Access
features.description: Web and mobile apps available in both Arabic and English.

features.title: AML & Fraud Detection
features.description: Advanced algorithms to detect and prevent suspicious activities.

features.title: Automated Reporting
features.description: Generate compliance and financial reports with a single click.

features.title: KPI Dashboards
features.description: Monitor performance metrics for charities and campaigns.

features.title: Multi-payment Options
features.description: Credit cards, bank transfers, QR codes, and digital wallets.

testimonialsDescription: Hear from stakeholders across the charitable ecosystem

testimonials.name: Ahmed Al-Thani
testimonials.quote: As a donor, I can now see exactly where my contribution goes, which makes me more confident in giving.

testimonials.name: Fatima Al-Attiyah
testimonials.quote: The Sandi integration has eliminated duplicate aid distribution, making our operations much more efficient.

testimonials.name: Khalid Al-Sulaiti
testimonials.quote: The compliance tools give us complete oversight while reducing our administrative workload significantly.
